_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: The resulting dNF1‐KO S2R+ cell line...was characterized by assessing the expression of neurofibromin using western blots. We found no detectable signal in the dNF1‐KO line compared to parental wild‐type (WT) S2R+ cells
details: Successfully detected neurofibromin expression in western blots, showing no detectable signal in dNF1-KO line compared to wild-type S2R+ cells
